root_cause_summary: Watchdog Timeout / Hard Lockup during suspend.
evidence: watchdog: Watchdog detected hard lockup on CPU 0
Kernel panic - not syncing: watchdog: Watchdog detected hard lockup on CPU 0

sop_steps.instruction: Connect JTAG and check Program Counter (PC) to identify the hang location.
sop_steps.expected_value: PC points to a specific loop or blocked function.
